## Checklist

- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, …)
- [ ] `task lint` and `task test` pass
- [ ] Touches money? Values stay integer minor units (kuruş, ADR-0003)
- [ ] New direction? Added/updated an ADR in `docs/decisions/`
